rationale: Clean, scope-respecting migration. The canned `agent.Result{ExitCode:-1, Error:"timeout after 5m"}` is now reproduced via `set-exit -1` + `fail-during 1` directives against the real script harness, and the test asserts against a real git HEAD that cannot advance. Assertions were preserved in spirit while correctly adapting the error string (`"timeout after 5m"` → `contains "script harness"`) to match the new real-harness signal.
